name: @ont/cli
description: ONT B5 surface — the `ont` CLI (clean-build). A thin operator orchestrator: consumes L1-L4 APIs and reimplements no rules; holds no keys and never signs (signing → B5-WALLET). First slice = read/query commands over an injected CliReadPort (mocked in tests; no live network). See docs/core/B5_CLI_CLASSIFICATION.md.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && vitest run
